rationale:
dim1: Answer key group is 'control'. Output misstatement_probability=42, which falls in the control band 30<p<50 -> score 1 (not the p<=30 band that would earn 2; the model retained moderate suspicion on a clean company).

dim2: Control case -> null per rubric (mechanism scoring applies to treatment cases only). Note for auditor: the top-ranked hypothesis (upfront recognition of fixed-fee patent licenses driving AR/revenue/OCF timing decoupling) is asserted on a control case; its evidentiary support is assessed under dim4.

dim3: Control case -> mapped_genre null, score null per rubric.

dim4: Score 3. Consistency rule check: p=42 with risk_tier='watch' satisfies 40<=p<70 => watch/elevated, so no cap. The cited data points are concrete, sourced to specific accession numbers/locations, and genuinely support the claims made: CL1/top_signal AR growth (28.079M at 2011-12-31 -> 169.874M at 2012-12-31, i.e., ~+505%) vs revenue growth (301.742M FY2011 -> 663.063M FY2012, ~+120%); CL3 NI/OCF divergence (FY2011 NI 89.468M vs OCF -34.338M; FY2013 NI 35.683M vs OCF 218.175M); CL6 deferred revenue decline (193.409M 2009 -> 60.176M 2013) against revenue levels (297.404M FY2009 -> 325.361M FY2013). These are combined coherently across multiple years and multiple line items into a consistent 'lumpy license timing' narrative, and mechanism assertions on this control case are framed as timing/volatility interpretations supported by the cited series rather than unsupported fraud claims. The output also honestly flags data gaps (CL8) and labels chronology-only items ('not provided in series') rather than fabricating accession numbers. This meets 2 (specific supportive data) plus coherent multi-year/multi-point combination -> 3.

memorization_suspect_condition2: false. The reasoning points at concrete provided data content (specific balances, revenues, cash flows with dates and accession numbers), not a bare document list, and mentions no post-cutoff facts (no revelation/enforcement/outcome references; the 10-K/A and 10-Q/A cited are filings within the provided chronology).

_meta.mapping_access_note: scoring/id_mapping_v2.json opened mechanically by grader_runner for answer-key join; neutral IDs only on stdout (label-joining deferred to Phase 6)
